items.title: Chelsea sign Rogers in record-breaking £117m deal
items.summary: Chelsea have completed the signing of Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa in a record-breaking £117m deal.

items.title: Morgan Rogers ‘excited to join biggest club in London’ after making £117m Chelsea move
items.summary: England international signs seven-year contract Xabi Alonso was key factor in Chelsea’s record signing Morgan Rogers has joined Chelsea from Aston Villa for a fee of £117m, signing a seven-year deal to become the Blues’ record signing. items.summary: COLE PALMER will no longer have to reach for his phone to congratulate Morgan Rogers. items.title: Enzo Fernandez: Argentina played with 'pride' and 'humility'
items.summary: Enzo Fernandez has praised Argentina for playing with "pride" and "humility" at the 2026 World Cup after it was confirmed FIFA will investigate the team's behaviour after the final.

items.title: Hearts suffer chastening CL defeat in nightmare first game for Vrancken
items.summary: New Hearts head coach Wouter Vrancken endured a nightmare debut as his side's Champions League hopes all but vanished with a 4-0 defeat against Sturm Graz.

items.title: 'I was saving it': Did Littler know sensational nine-darter was coming?
items.summary: Luke Littler thinks he still has a long way to go to be the "greatest ever" darts player but is motivated to keep checking achievements off his list, starting with going back-to-back at the World Matchplay in Blackpool.
